summary: Completed regression testing for iteration 90 after refactoring. Backend: 10/10 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. Data Health Badge is properly positioned inline with Projection Vision title as a compact amber pill. API Center routes extracted and working.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend refactoring - all extracted routes working correctly:
- POST /api/api-center/receive accepts webhook payload (NEWLY extracted route)
VERIFIED: Data Health Badge positioned correctly:
- Compact amber pill showing '50% · 4 missing' inline with 'Projection Vision' title
- Located at line 4419 in ProfitTrackerPage.jsx inside CardTitle component
- Clicking badge opens Pre-Sync Wizard dialog correctly
- Profit Tracker page loads with Account Value, Deposits, Projection Vision sections
- Access Records button shows Deposit/Withdrawal/Commission Records dialogs
- Simulate Actions dialog opens with all simulation options
- Trade Monitor page loads with Active Signal, Trade Control, and forex ticker
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90 completed full regression testing after refactoring. All backend endpoints working including newly extracted API Center routes. Data Health Badge (data-testid='data-health-badge') shows as compact amber pill inline with 'Projection Vision' title. Key test data-testids: data-health-badge, pre-sync-wizard-dialog, sync-balance-btn. The test user Ryan Salvador has 4 missing trade days shown in Pre-Sync Wizard. Use JavaScript clicks for Sync button: await page.evaluate(() => document.querySelector('[data-testid="sync-balance-btn"]').click()). Skip tour by clicking 'Skip Tour'.
